subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-i-Qablí-Taqí! God magnify thy recompense for thy son who hath ascended unto Him, even as did My son Mahdi ascend in former times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل تقی عظم الله اجرک فی ابنک الذی صعد الیه کما صعد ابنی مهدی فی اول
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
